patterns.color_constants: gantt.rs defines state_ansi(), state_ansi_bg(), RESET, DIM, BOLD constants for ANSI terminal colors
patterns.state_colors: pending=steel blue, running=amber, done=green, failed=red, merged=violet
patterns.stats_calculation: gantt.rs shows pattern for computing duration stats from Meta.runs[].duration_s
patterns.command_structure: Commands in main.rs match to functions in submodules (cards::, list::, doctor::)
patterns.success_messages: Currently most commands just return Ok(()), no user feedback

existing_implementations.description: gantt.rs already has comprehensive ANSI color system and stats calculation for timeline view
relevant_files: crates/bop-cli/src/gantt.rs (lines 149-174 for colors, lines 313-323 for stats)
existing_implementations.duration_source: Meta.runs[] array contains RunRecord structs with duration_s: Option<u64> field
